modules.module_title: Madrasa Education ke Buniyadi Usool aur Tadrees ke Tareeqe
Hadees, Fiqh aur Seerat ki Tadrees
Arabi Zaban aur Islami Akhlaqiyat ki Tadrees
Classroom Management aur Bachon ki Nafsiyat
Lesson Planning, Assessment aur Madrasa ke Ijtimai Kirdar

questions.question: Ek Madrasa ustad ka sabse aham kirdar kya hai?

options.A: Bachon ko sirf kitaabi ilm dena
options.B: Bachon ki ruhani aur akhlaqi tarbiyat karna
options.C: Bachon ko sirf imtihaan mein paas karwana
options.D: Bachon ko khel-kood mein mashgool rakhna

questions.explanation: Madrasa ustad ka buniyadi maqsad bachon ki sirf kitaabi nahi, balki ruhani aur akhlaqi tarbiyat karna bhi hai.

questions.question: Madrasa teaching mein 'Taleem' aur 'Tarbiyat' mein kya farq hai?

options.A: Koi farq nahi, dono ek hi cheez hain
options.B: Taleem sirf ilm dena hai, Tarbiyat akhlaq aur kirdar banana hai
options.C: Tarbiyat sirf bade bachon ke liye hai, Taleem choton ke liye
options.D: Taleem ghar par di jaati hai, Tarbiyat Madrasa mein

questions.explanation: Taleem ka matlab ilm sikhana hai, jabki Tarbiyat ka matlab akhlaqi aur samajik qadron ko farogh dena aur kirdar saazi karna hai.

questions.question: Ek achhe Madrasa ustad ki pehli sifaat kya honi chahiye?

options.B: Apne ilm par ghamand karna
options.D: Sirf achhi tanqeeh (salary) ki talab

questions.explanation: Ek ustad ke liye tadrees ka junoon aur bachon ke saath sabr aur narmi ikhtiyar karna bahut zaroori hai.

questions.question: Islami taleem mein 'Ikhlaq' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Achhe aadab aur kirdar
options.D: Duniyaawi ilm hasil karna

questions.explanation: Ikhlaq se murad achhe aadab, kirdar, aur muamlaat hain jo Islam sikhata hai.

questions.question: Madrasa mein bachon ko motivate karne ka sabse behtar tareeqa kya hai?

options.B: Unki tareef karna aur unhe inam dena
options.D: Unhe darrana

questions.explanation: Bachon ko positive feedback, tareef aur chhote inamaat se motivate karna unki learning mein madad karta hai.

questions.question: Madrasa mein 'Shura' (consultation) ki kya ahmiyat hai?

options.A: Koi ahmiyat nahi, ustad ka faisla aakhri hota hai
options.B: Milkar faisle karne se behtar nataij milte hain
options.C: Sirf bade masail mein shura karna chahiye
options.D: Shura sirf intezamia ke liye hai

questions.explanation: Shura (consultation) Islami usool hai jo milkar faisle karne aur behtar nataij tak pahunchne mein madad karta hai, chahe woh taleemi ho ya intezami.

questions.question: Ek ustad ko bachon ke saath kaisa sulook karna chahiye?

options.B: Dosti aur narmi ke saath
options.D: Unhe hamesha chhota mehsoos karana

questions.explanation: Ustad ko bachon ke saath dosti aur narmi se pesh aana chahiye taaki woh aazadi se seekh saken aur apni mushkilaat bata saken.

questions.question: Madrasa taleem mein 'Tazkiya-e-Nafs' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Roohani pakizgi aur nafz ki islah
options.D: Sirf jism ko saaf rakhna

questions.explanation: Tazkiya-e-Nafs ka matlab apni roohani pakizgi karna, buri aadaton se bachna aur nafz ki islah karna hai.

questions.question: Modern teaching methods ko Madrasa mein kaise istemal kiya ja sakta hai?

options.B: Sirf blackboard aur chalk ka istemal karna
options.C: Digital tools aur interactive tareeqon ko Islami qadron ke mutabiq adopt karna
options.D: Sirf kitaabon par inhesar karna

questions.explanation: Modern teaching methods jaise digital tools, audio-visual aids aur interactive tareeqon ko Islami qadron aur taleemi maqasid ke mutabiq istemal kiya ja sakta hai taaki taleem ziyada asardar ho.

questions.question: Ustad ki 'Misali Shakhsiyat' (exemplary personality) bachon par kya asar dalti hai?

options.B: Bachon ke kirdar aur akhlaq par gehra asar dalti hai
options.C: Sirf unki academic performance par asar dalti hai
options.D: Bachon ko sirf darrati hai

questions.explanation: Ustad ki shakhsiyat bachon ke liye ek role model hoti hai, aur unka achha kirdar bachon ki tarbiyat par gehra asar dalta hai.

questions.question: Madrasa mein 'Qudrat se seekhna' (learning from nature) ko kaise farogh diya ja sakta hai?

options.A: Iska Islami taleem se koi talluq nahi
options.B: Bachon ko qudrat ki nishaniyon par ghaur karne ki targheeb dena
options.C: Sirf science ke mazmoon mein iski baat karna
options.D: Bachon ko jungle mein bhej dena

questions.explanation: Islam qudrat mein Allah ki nishaniyon par ghaur karne ki targheeb deta hai. Ustad bachon ko qudrat ke nazaron, janwaron aur nabataat mein Allah ki qudrat aur hikmat ko samajhne ki hidayat de sakte hain.

questions.question: Taleemi nizaam mein 'Ijtimaiyat' (collectivism) ki kya ahmiyat hai?

options.A: Sirf fardi taraqqi par zor dena chahiye
options.B: Milkar kaam karne aur ek doosre ki madad karne ka jazba paida karna
options.C: Ijtimaiyat se bachon ki fardiyat khatam ho jaati hai
options.D: Ye sirf khelon ke liye zaroori hai

questions.explanation: Ijtimaiyat Islami taleem ka aham juz hai, jo bachon mein team work, ek doosre ki madad aur samajik zimmedari ka ehsaas paida karta hai.

questions.question: Ek ustad ko taleemi maqasid (learning objectives) kyun tay karne chahiye?

options.B: Taleemi amal ko wazeh aur maqsad-pasand banane ke liye
options.C: Bachon ko mushkil mein dalne ke liye
options.D: Ye sirf school management ka kaam hai

questions.explanation: Taleemi maqasid tay karne se ustad ko pata hota hai ki woh kya sikhana chahte hain aur bachon ko kya sikhna hai, jisse taleemi amal wazeh aur asardar hota hai.

questions.question: Madrasa mein 'Muraqabah' (reflection) ki mashq kaise karayi ja sakti hai?

options.A: Bachon ko sirf chup baithne ko kehna
options.B: Unhe apne din ke amal aur Allah ki nematon par ghaur karne ki targheeb dena
options.C: Muraqabah sirf bade logon ke liye hai
options.D: Iski Islami taleem mein koi jagah nahi

questions.explanation: Muraqabah se bachon mein khud-ehtisabi (self-accountability) aur shukr guzari ka jazba paida hota hai. Ustad unhe din bhar ke amal aur Allah ki nematon par ghaur karne ki targheeb de sakte hain.

questions.question: Ustad ko bachon ki fardi salahiyaton (individual capabilities) ko kaise pehchanna chahiye?

options.A: Sab bachon ko ek hi nazar se dekhna
options.B: Har bache par alag se tawajjo dena aur unki quwwaton ko farogh dena
options.C: Jo bacha kamzor hai, uspar tawajjo na dena
options.D: Sirf hoshiyar bachon par tawajjo dena

questions.explanation: Har bacha alag hota hai. Ustad ko har bache ki fardi salahiyaton ko pehchanna chahiye aur unke mutabiq unki rehnumai karni chahiye.

questions.question: Madrasa mein 'Tafakkur' (contemplation) ki ahmiyat kya hai?

options.A: Ye sirf fikr-mandon ke liye hai
options.B: Gehri soch aur ghaur-o-fikr se ilm aur hikmat hasil karna
options.D: Isse waqt zaya hota hai

questions.explanation: Tafakkur Islami taleem ka aham hissa hai, jo bachon ko gehri soch, ghaur-o-fikr aur masail par tadabbur karne ki salahiyat deta hai.

questions.question: Ek ustad ko bachon ke walidain (parents) ke saath kaisa rabta rakhna chahiye?

options.B: Sirf shikayat karne ke liye rabta karna
options.C: Regular rabta rakhna aur bachon ki progress share karna
options.D: Walidain ko Madrasa ke mamlaat se door rakhna

questions.explanation: Bachon ki behtar tarbiyat ke liye walidain ke saath regular rabta aur unki progress share karna bahut zaroori hai.

questions.question: Quran padhane se pehle bachon ko kya sikhana zaroori hai?

options.B: Harf-e-tahajji (alphabets) aur unki sahih makharij
options.C: Seedha Quran ki tilawat shuru karwa dena
options.D: Sirf kahaniyan sunana

questions.explanation: Quran ki sahih tilawat ke liye harf-e-tahajji aur unke makharij ka sahih ilm hona buniyadi zaroorat hai.

questions.question: Tajweed ka buniyadi maqsad kya hai?

options.B: Quran ko arabi zaban mein padhna
options.C: Quran ko Allah ke nabi (SAW) ke tareeqe se sahih padhna
options.D: Sirf tilawat ko khoobsurat banana

questions.explanation: Tajweed ka maqsad Quran ko ussi tareeqe se padhna hai jaise Huzoor (SAW) padhte the, yani sahih makharij aur sifat ke saath.

questions.question: Bachon ko Quran hifz karwane ka sabse behtar tareeqa kya hai?

options.A: Ek hi baar mein poora juz hifz karwana
options.B: Thoda-thoda karke, baar baar takrar (repetition) ke saath
options.D: Unhe darrana ki agar hifz nahi kiya to saza milegi

questions.explanation: Thoda-thoda karke, regular takrar aur ustad ki rehnumai mein hifz karwana sabse asardar tareeqa hai.

questions.question: Makharij-ul-Huroof se kya murad hai?

options.B: Huroof ke nikalne ki jagah
options.D: Huroof ki awaaz

questions.explanation: Makharij-ul-Huroof se murad woh jagah hain jahan se arabi huroof sahih tareeqe se ada hote hain.

questions.question: 'Idgham' Tajweed ka ek qaaida hai, iska kya matlab hai?

options.B: Ek harf ko doosre harf mein mila dena
options.D: Harf ko chhota karna

questions.explanation: Idgham ka matlab hai ek harf ko doosre harf mein daakhil karke mila dena, jaise 'noon sakin' ya 'tanween' ke baad Idgham ke huroof aayen.

questions.question: Bachon ko Quran ki tilawat mein dilchasp (interesting) kaise banaya ja sakta hai?

options.B: Achhi awaaz mein khud tilawat karna aur unhe sunana
options.C: Unhe darrana ki ghalat padhne par saza milegi
options.D: Unhe sirf kitaab dekhne ko kehna

questions.explanation: Ustad ki achhi aur dilkash tilawat bachon ko bhi tilawat mein dilchasp banati hai.

questions.question: Tajweed padhate waqt kis baat ka khas khayal rakhna chahiye?

options.B: Qaaidon ko misalon ke saath practical tareeqe se sikhana
options.C: Sirf bade bachon ko Tajweed sikhana
options.D: Tajweed ko bahut mushkil banana

questions.explanation: Tajweed ke qaaidon ko misalon ke saath practical tareeqe se sikhana zaroori hai taaki bache unhe samajh saken aur tatbeeq kar saken.

questions.question: 'Madd' Tajweed ka ek qaaida hai, iska kya matlab hai?

options.B: Huroof ko khinchna (stretch) ya lamba karna
options.D: Huroof ko jald se jald ada karna

questions.explanation: Madd ka matlab hai harf ko uski miqdar ke mutabiq khinchna ya lamba karna, jaise Madd-e-Asli, Madd-e-Far'i.

questions.question: Bachon ko Quran ki ahmiyat kaise samjhayi ja sakti hai?

options.B: Quran ki kahaniyan aur uske ahkam ko unki zindagi se jod kar
options.C: Unhe sirf Quran padhne ko keh kar
options.D: Unhe Quran ka matlab na bata kar

questions.explanation: Quran ki kahaniyan, uske ahkam aur uski rehnumai ko bachon ki rozmarra zindagi se jod kar samjhane se woh uski ahmiyat ko behtar tareeqe se samajh sakte hain.

questions.question: Quran hifz karwate waqt ustad ko kis baat par tawajjo deni chahiye?

options.B: Hifz ki miqdar ke saath-saath sahih tajweed aur durustgi par
options.D: Bachon ko khud se hifz karne dena

questions.explanation: Hifz ke saath-saath sahih tajweed aur durustgi par tawajjo dena zaroori hai taaki bache ghalat hifz na kar len.

questions.question: Agar koi bacha Tajweed ke qaaide samajhne mein mushkil mehsoos kare to ustad ko kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Use alag se aur zyada waqt dena, aur aasan tareeqon se samjhana
options.D: Use sirf kitaab se padhne ko kehna

questions.explanation: Har bache ki learning speed alag hoti hai. Ustad ko sabr se kaam lena chahiye aur kamzor bachon ko alag se tawajjo deni chahiye.

questions.question: Quran ki tilawat ke aadab mein kya shamil hai?

options.B: Wazu ke saath, qibla rukh baith kar aur adab se padhna
options.D: Shor-sharaba karte hue padhna

questions.explanation: Quran ki tilawat ke kuch aadab hain jin mein wazu, qibla rukh hona aur adab se baithna shamil hai.

questions.question: Bachon ko 'Ghunnah' ka qaaida kaise sikhaya ja sakta hai?

options.A: Sirf kitab se padhne ko kehna
options.B: Naak se awaaz nikalne ki mashq karwana aur misalon se samjhana
options.D: Ghunnah sirf bade logon ke liye hai

questions.explanation: Ghunnah naak se nikalne wali awaaz hai. Ustad ko bachon ko iski mashq karwani chahiye aur misalon se iski muddat samjhani chahiye.

questions.question: Quran ki ayat ke maani (meaning) samjhana kyun zaroori hai?

options.A: Zaroori nahi, sirf tilawat kafi hai
options.B: Taaki bache Quran ke paigham ko samajh saken aur uspar amal kar saken
options.C: Ye sirf bade ulema ka kaam hai
options.D: Isse bachon ke dimagh par bojh padta hai

questions.explanation: Maani samajhne se bache Quran ke paigham aur ahkam ko samajhte hain, jisse unki zindagi mein iska asar hota hai.

questions.question: Bachon mein Quran se mohabbat kaise paida ki ja sakti hai?

options.A: Unhe Quran padhne par majboor karna
options.B: Quran ki fazeelat, uski kahaniyan aur uske fawaid bata kar
options.D: Quran ko mushkil bana kar pesh karna

questions.explanation: Quran ki fazeelat, uski kahaniyan aur uske fawaid bata kar bachon mein usse mohabbat paida ki ja sakti hai.

questions.question: Agar bacha hifz karte waqt baar baar bhool jaye to ustad ko kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Use mazeed takrar (revision) karwane aur sabr se kaam lena
options.C: Use hifz karna chhod dene ko kehna
options.D: Uski shikayat walidain se karna

questions.explanation: Hifz mein bhoolna aam baat hai. Ustad ko sabr se kaam lena chahiye aur bache ko mazeed takrar karwane ki hidayat deni chahiye.

questions.question: Online resources ka istemal Quran aur Tajweed teaching mein kaise kiya ja sakta hai?

options.A: Online resources bilkul istemal nahi karne chahiye
options.B: Sahi Tajweed ke audio/video, interactive apps aur online Quran classes ka istemal karna
options.C: Sirf entertainment ke liye istemal karna
options.D: Online resources sirf waqt zaya karte hain

questions.explanation: Online resources jaise sahi Tajweed ke audio/video clips, interactive Tajweed apps aur online Quran classes modern daur mein teaching ko asardar bana sakte hain.

questions.question: Hadees ki buniyadi ahmiyat Islami taleem mein kya hai?

options.A: Ye sirf tareekh ki kitaab hai
options.B: Ye Quran ki tafseer aur Nabi (SAW) ki sunnat hai
options.D: Iska Islami qanoon se koi talluq nahi

questions.explanation: Hadees Quran ki tafseer hai aur Nabi (SAW) ki sunnat aur tareeqa-e-hayat ko samjhne ka zariya hai.

questions.question: Bachon ko Hadees padhate waqt kis baat ka khas khayal rakhna chahiye?

options.A: Sirf Hadees ke alfaaz yaad karwana
options.B: Hadees ke maani, uske paigham aur uspar amal ki targheeb dena
options.C: Hadees ko sirf mushkil tareeqe se padhana
options.D: Hadees ko sirf bade logon ke liye rakhna

questions.explanation: Hadees ke maani, uske paigham aur uspar amal ki targheeb dena zaroori hai taaki bache usse seekh saken.

questions.question: 'Fiqh' ka buniyadi maqsad kya hai?

options.B: Islami qanoon aur ahkam ko samajhna aur unpar amal karna
options.D: Duniyaawi masail hal karna

questions.explanation: Fiqh Islami qanoon (Shariah) ko samajhne aur uske ahkam par amal karne ka ilm hai.

questions.question: Bachon ko Fiqh padhate waqt kya tareeqa apnana chahiye?

options.A: Sirf mushkil masail par baat karna
options.B: Aasan aur rozmarra ke masail ko misalon ke saath samjhana
options.C: Unhe Fiqh ki kitaaben yaad karwane ko kehna
options.D: Fiqh ko sirf bade logon ke liye rakhna

questions.explanation: Bachon ko Fiqh ke aasan aur rozmarra ke masail ko misalon ke saath samjhana chahiye taaki woh unpar amal kar saken.

questions.question: 'Seerat-un-Nabi' (SAW) padhane ki ahmiyat kya hai?

options.B: Nabi (SAW) ki zindagi se sabaq lena aur unke naqsh-e-qadam par chalna
options.D: Iska Islami akhlaq se koi talluq nahi

questions.explanation: Seerat-un-Nabi (SAW) padhane se bachon ko Nabi (SAW) ki zindagi se sabaq milta hai aur woh unke naqsh-e-qadam par chalne ki koshish karte hain.

questions.question: Seerat-un-Nabi (SAW) ko dilchasp tareeqe se kaise padhaya ja sakta hai?

options.B: Kahaniyan, qisse aur drame ke zariye padhana
options.D: Seerat ko chhod dena

questions.explanation: Seerat-un-Nabi (SAW) ko kahaniyan, qisse aur drame ke zariye padhana bachon ke liye dilchasp aur yadgar banata hai.

questions.question: Hadees-e-Qudsi kya hai?

options.B: Allah Ta'ala ka farman jo Nabi (SAW) ne apni zaban se bayan kiya
options.D: Taba'een ka qaul

questions.explanation: Hadees-e-Qudsi woh hadees hai jis mein Allah Ta'ala ka farman hota hai, lekin uske alfaaz Nabi (SAW) ke hote hain.

questions.question: Fiqh mein 'Ijtehad' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Sirf Quran aur Hadees par amal karna
options.B: Naye masail ka Islami usoolon ki roshni mein hal talash karna
options.C: Kisi bhi masle par apni marzi se faisla karna
options.D: Ijtehad ki zaroorat nahi

questions.explanation: Ijtehad Islami usoolon (Quran, Sunnat, Ijma, Qiyas) ki roshni mein naye masail ka hal talash karne ki koshish ko kehte hain.

questions.question: Nabi (SAW) ki zindagi se 'Sabr' aur 'Shukr' ka dars kaise diya ja sakta hai?

options.A: Sirf unke mushkil waqiyat bata kar
options.B: Unke sabr aur shukr ke waqiyat ko misalon ke saath samjha kar
options.C: Sabr aur shukr ki ahmiyat na bata kar
options.D: Ye sirf bade logon ke liye hai

questions.explanation: Nabi (SAW) ki zindagi mein sabr aur shukr ki behtareen misalen hain. Ustad un waqiyat ko misalon ke saath samjha kar bachon ko dars de sakte hain.

questions.question: Hadees mein 'Sanad' aur 'Matn' se kya murad hai?

options.A: Sanad Hadees ka matn hai aur Matn Hadees ki sanad hai
options.B: Sanad Hadees ke raaviyon ka silsila hai aur Matn Hadees ke alfaaz
options.C: Dono ka matlab ek hi hai
options.D: Sanad Hadees ki fazeelat hai aur Matn Hadees ki ahmiyat

questions.explanation: Sanad Hadees ko bayan karne walon ka silsila hai jabki Matn Hadees ke asal alfaaz aur uska paigham hai.

questions.question: Fiqh mein 'Wazu' ke faraiz kitne hain?

options.B: Teen
options.D: Panch

questions.explanation: Wazu ke char faraiz hain: Chehra dhona, kohniyon tak haath dhona, sar ka masah karna aur takhnon tak paon dhona.

questions.question: Seerat padhate waqt Nabi (SAW) ki kis sifaat par khas zor dena chahiye?

options.B: Unki amanatdari, sachchai, narmi aur adl par
options.D: Unki daulat par

questions.explanation: Nabi (SAW) ki amanatdari, sachchai, narmi aur adl jaisi sifaat par zor dena chahiye taaki bache unse mutasir ho saken.

questions.question: Bachon ko Hadees ke zariye 'Birr-ul-Walidain' (parents ke huqooq) kaise sikhaya ja sakta hai?

options.B: Hadees ki roshni mein walidain ke huqooq aur unki farmabardari ki ahmiyat samjha kar
options.C: Walidain ke huqooq ko nazar-andaaz karna
options.D: Ye sirf bade bachon ke liye hai

questions.explanation: Hadees mein walidain ke huqooq aur unki farmabardari ki bahut ahmiyat bayan ki gayi hai. Ustad un Hadeeson ko misalon ke saath samjha kar bachon ko dars de sakte hain.

questions.question: Fiqh mein 'Tayammum' kab jaiz hai?

options.B: Jab paani na mile ya istemal karne se nuqsan ho
options.D: Sirf safar mein

questions.explanation: Tayammum us waqt jaiz hai jab paani maujood na ho ya uske istemal se beemari ya nuqsan ka andesha ho.

questions.question: Nabi (SAW) ki hijrat Madina se kya sabaq milta hai?

options.B: Deen ki khatir qurbani aur azm
options.D: Hijrat sirf siyasi maqasid ke liye thi

questions.explanation: Hijrat Madina se deen ki khatir qurbani, azm aur Allah par tawakkul ka dars milta hai.

questions.question: Bachon ko Hadees ke zariye 'Haqooq-ul-Ibad' (bandon ke huqooq) kaise samjhayen?

options.B: Misalon aur role-play ke zariye Haqooq-ul-Ibad ki ahmiyat aur unpar amal ki targheeb dekar
options.C: Haqooq-ul-Ibad ko mushkil bana kar pesh karna
options.D: Ye sirf bade logon ke liye hai

questions.explanation: Haqooq-ul-Ibad Islami taleem ka aham juz hai. Ustad Hadees ki roshni mein misalon aur role-play ke zariye bachon ko iski ahmiyat samjha sakte hain.

questions.question: Fiqh mein 'Zakat' kis par farz hai?

options.B: Har us Musalman par jo sahib-e-nisab ho
options.D: Sirf ameer logon par

questions.explanation: Zakat har us Musalman par farz hai jo nisab ka sahib ho, yani ek khaas miqdar mein maal ka malik ho.

questions.question: Arabi zaban sikhane ka buniyadi maqsad kya hai?

options.B: Quran, Hadees aur Islami ulum ko directly samajhna
options.D: Sirf arabi mulkon mein kaam karna

questions.explanation: Arabi zaban sikhne se Quran, Hadees aur Islami ulum ko unki asal shakal mein samajhne mein madad milti hai.

questions.question: Bachon ko Arabi ke buniyadi alfaaz (basic vocabulary) kaise sikhaye ja sakte hain?

options.B: Tasweeron, khelon aur rozmarra ki cheezon ke naam ke zariye
options.D: Sirf bade bachon ko alfaaz sikhana

questions.explanation: Tasweeron, khelon aur rozmarra ki cheezon ke naam ke zariye bachon ko Arabi ke buniyadi alfaaz sikhana asardar tareeqa hai.

questions.question: Islami Akhlaqiyat mein 'Amanatdari' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Har cheez, baat aur zimmedari ko imandari se nibhana
options.C: Amanatdari sirf bade logon ke liye hai
options.D: Amanatdari ki zaroorat nahi

questions.explanation: Amanatdari ka matlab hai har cheez, baat aur zimmedari ko imandari se nibhana, chahe woh maal ho, raaz ho ya zimmedari.

questions.question: Bachon mein 'Sachchai' (truthfulness) ki ahmiyat kaise paida ki ja sakti hai?

options.B: Nabi (SAW) aur Sahaba ke sachchai ke waqiyat bata kar aur khud sach bol kar
options.C: Sachchai ki ahmiyat na bata kar
options.D: Sirf imtehan mein sach likhne ko kehna

questions.explanation: Nabi (SAW) aur Sahaba ke sachchai ke waqiyat bata kar aur ustad khud sach bol kar bachon mein sachchai ki ahmiyat paida kar sakte hain.

questions.question: Arabi mein 'Ism' (Noun) aur 'Fail' (Verb) ka buniyadi farq kya hai?

options.B: Ism naam hai aur Fail kaam hai
options.C: Ism kaam hai aur Fail naam hai
options.D: Dono ek hi hain

questions.explanation: Arabi grammar mein Ism kisi cheez, shakhs ya jagah ka naam hota hai, jabki Fail kisi kaam ya harkat ko bayan karta hai.

questions.question: Bachon ko 'Adab-e-Muasharat' (social manners) kaise sikhaya ja sakta hai?

options.B: Practical misalon, role-play aur khud amal karke
options.C: Adab ki ahmiyat na bata kar
options.D: Ye sirf bade logon ke liye hai

questions.explanation: Adab-e-Muasharat ko practical misalon, role-play aur ustad ke khud amal karne se bachon ko behtar tareeqe se sikhaya ja sakta hai.

questions.question: Arabi zaban mein 'Muzakkar' (Masculine) aur 'Muannas' (Feminine) ki pehchan kaise ki jaati hai?

options.B: Alfaaz ki shakal aur kuch khaas nishaniyon se
options.D: Sirf kitaab se yaad karwana

questions.explanation: Arabi mein Muzakkar aur Muannas ki pehchan alfaaz ki shakal, khaas nishaniyan (jaise taa marbuta) aur qaaidon se ki jaati hai.

questions.question: Bachon mein 'Ittehad' (unity) aur 'Bhaichara' kaise farogh diya ja sakta hai?

options.B: Islami taleemat ki roshni mein ittehad ki ahmiyat bata kar aur milkar kaam karwa kar
options.D: Ye sirf bade logon ke liye hai

questions.explanation: Islami taleemat ittehad aur bhaichare par zor deti hain. Ustad unhe iski ahmiyat bata kar aur milkar kaam karwa kar is jazbe ko farogh de sakte hain.

questions.question: Arabi mein 'Harf-e-Jarr' (preposition) ka kya kaam hai?

options.B: Ism ko Fail se jodna
options.C: Ism aur Fail ke darmiyan talluq paida karna
options.D: Jumle ko mushkil banana

questions.explanation: Harf-e-Jarr Arabi grammar mein Ism aur Fail ke darmiyan talluq paida karta hai aur Ism ko majroor karta hai.

questions.question: Islami Akhlaqiyat mein 'Qana'at' (contentment) ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Jo mil jaye uspar khush rehna aur shukr karna
options.D: Hamesha zyada ki talab karna

questions.explanation: Qana'at ka matlab hai jo kuch Allah ne diya hai uspar raazi rehna aur shukr guzari karna.

questions.question: Bachon ko Arabi mein 'Sawalat' (questions) aur 'Jawabat' (answers) kaise sikhaye ja sakte hain?

options.B: Simple sawalon aur jawabon ki mashq karwana
options.D: Sirf sawal sikhana

questions.explanation: Simple sawalon aur jawabon ki mashq karwane se bache Arabi mein baat karna seekh sakte hain.

questions.question: Islami Akhlaqiyat mein 'Narmi' (gentleness) aur 'Reham' (mercy) ki kya ahmiyat hai?

options.A: Ye sirf kamzor logon ke liye hai
options.B: Ye Islami kirdar ka aham juz hain, jo har Musalman mein honi chahiye
options.C: Narmi se log kamzor samajhte hain
options.D: Reham ki zaroorat nahi

questions.explanation: Narmi aur Reham Islami kirdar ki buniyadi sifaat hain, jo Nabi (SAW) ki zindagi mein bhi numayan theen.

questions.question: Arabi zaban mein 'Mufrad' (singular) aur 'Jama' (plural) ki pehchan kaise ki jaati hai?

options.B: Alfaaz ki shakal aur khaas qaaidon se
options.D: Sirf kitaab se yaad karwana

questions.explanation: Arabi mein Mufrad aur Jama ki pehchan alfaaz ki shakal aur khaas qaaidon se ki jaati hai, jaise 'un' aur 'een' ki ziyadti.

questions.question: Bachon mein 'Shukr guzari' (gratitude) ka jazba kaise paida kiya ja sakta hai?

options.A: Unhe sirf Allah ki nematon ko ginte rehne ko kehna
options.B: Allah ki nematon ko yaad dilana aur unpar shukr karne ki targheeb dena
options.C: Shukr guzari ki ahmiyat na bata kar
options.D: Sirf bade logon ko shukr guzari sikhana

questions.explanation: Allah ki nematon ko yaad dilana aur unpar shukr karne ki targheeb dena bachon mein shukr guzari ka jazba paida karta hai.

questions.question: Arabi zaban mein 'Jumla Ismiya' (Nominal Sentence) aur 'Jumla Failiya' (Verbal Sentence) mein kya farq hai?

options.B: Jumla Ismiya Ism se shuru hota hai, Jumla Failiya Fail se shuru hota hai
options.C: Jumla Ismiya Fail se shuru hota hai, Jumla Failiya Ism se shuru hota hai
options.D: Koi farq nahi

questions.explanation: Jumla Ismiya woh jumla hai jo kisi Ism (noun) se shuru hota hai, jabki Jumla Failiya woh jumla hai jo kisi Fail (verb) se shuru hota hai.

questions.question: Islami Akhlaqiyat mein 'Safaai' (cleanliness) ki kya ahmiyat hai?

options.A: Safaai sirf jism ki zaroori hai
options.B: Safaai nisf iman hai, jism aur rooh dono ki zaroori hai
options.D: Safaai sirf ghar ki zaroori hai

questions.explanation: Islam mein safaai ko nisf iman kaha gaya hai, jo jism, libas, jagah aur roohani dono safaai par zor deta hai.

questions.question: Bachon ko Arabi mein 'Rozmarra ki Guftagu' (daily conversation) kaise sikhayi ja sakti hai?

options.B: Chhote-chhote jumlon aur sawalon-jawabon ki mashq karwana
options.D: Sirf bade bachon ko guftagu sikhana

questions.explanation: Chhote-chhote jumlon aur sawalon-jawabon ki mashq karwane se bache Arabi mein rozmarra ki guftagu karna seekh sakte hain.

questions.question: Classroom management ka buniyadi maqsad kya hai?

options.B: Taleemi mahaul ko asardar aur pur-aman banana
options.D: Sirf ustad ka waqt bachana

questions.explanation: Classroom management ka maqsad ek aisa mahaul banana hai jahan bache behtar tareeqe se seekh saken.

questions.question: Agar koi bacha class mein disturb kare to ustad ko kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Narmi se samjhana aur uski wajah janne ki koshish karna
options.D: Use nazar-andaaz karna

questions.explanation: Bache ke disturb karne ki wajah janne ki koshish karna aur narmi se samjhana pehla qadam hona chahiye.

questions.question: Bachon ki nafsiyat (child psychology) samajhna ustad ke liye kyun zaroori hai?

options.B: Taaki woh bachon ki zarooriyat aur masail ko samajh saken aur unki behtar tarbiyat kar saken
options.C: Sirf unhe control karne ke liye
options.D: Ye sirf doctors ka kaam hai

questions.explanation: Bachon ki nafsiyat samajhne se ustad unki zarooriyat, masail aur learning styles ko samajh kar behtar tareeqe se sikhate hain.

questions.question: Classroom mein 'Rules and Regulations' banane ki kya ahmiyat hai?

options.B: Classroom mein nizam aur discipline qaim karne ke liye
options.C: Sirf bachon ko darrane ke liye
options.D: Ye sirf ustad ka ikhtiyar hai

questions.explanation: Wazeh rules and regulations classroom mein nizam aur discipline qaim karne mein madad karte hain.

questions.question: Bachon mein 'Self-esteem' (khud-ehtirami) kaise badhayi ja sakti hai?

options.A: Unki ghaltiyon par hamesha tanqeed karna
options.B: Unki koshishon ki tareef karna aur unhe chote kamyabiyan hasil karne mein madad dena
options.C: Unhe hamesha doosron se compare karna
options.D: Unhe chhota mehsoos karana

questions.explanation: Bachon ki koshishon ki tareef karna aur unhe chote kamyabiyan hasil karne mein madad dena unki self-esteem badhata hai.

questions.question: Agar koi bacha padhne mein kamzor ho to ustad ko kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Uski mushkil ki wajah janne ki koshish karna aur alag se rehnumai karna
options.D: Uski shikayat walidain se karna

questions.explanation: Kamzor bachon ki mushkil ki wajah janne ki koshish karna aur unhe alag se tawajjo dena ustad ki zimmedari hai.

questions.question: 'Active Listening' (mutawajjih hokar sunna) classroom mein kyun zaroori hai?

options.B: Bachon ko samajhne aur unse behtar talluq qaim karne ke liye
options.C: Sirf ustad ka waqt zaya hota hai
options.D: Ye sirf bade logon ke liye hai

questions.explanation: Active listening se ustad bachon ki baaton ko behtar tareeqe se samajhte hain aur unse mazboot talluq qaim hota hai.

questions.question: Bachon mein 'Cooperation' (taawun) kaise farogh diya ja sakta hai?

options.A: Unhe hamesha competition mein rakh kar
options.B: Group activities aur team projects ke zariye
options.C: Unhe alag alag kaam karwa kar
options.D: Taawun ki zaroorat nahi

questions.explanation: Group activities aur team projects bachon mein taawun aur team work ka jazba paida karte hain.

questions.question: Agar koi bacha class mein 'Bully' kare to ustad ko kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Faoran mudakhilat karna, dono bachon se baat karna aur hal talash karna
options.C: Sirf bully karne wale bache ko saza dena
options.D: Bully ko badhawa dena

questions.explanation: Bullying ek sanjeeda masla hai. Ustad ko faoran mudakhilat karni chahiye, dono bachon se baat karni chahiye aur hal talash karna chahiye.

questions.question: Bachon mein 'Problem-solving skills' kaise develop ki ja sakti hain?

options.B: Chhote masail par ghaur karne aur unka hal nikalne ki targheeb dena
options.D: Problem-solving ki zaroorat nahi

questions.explanation: Chhote masail par ghaur karne aur unka hal nikalne ki targheeb dena bachon mein problem-solving skills develop karta hai.

questions.question: Classroom mein 'Positive Reinforcement' (saraahna) ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Achhe amal aur koshishon ki tareef karna aur inam dena
options.D: Positive reinforcement ki zaroorat nahi

questions.explanation: Positive reinforcement bachon ke achhe amal aur koshishon ki tareef karna aur inam dena hai, jisse woh mazeed achha karne ki koshish karte hain.

questions.question: Bachon ki 'Attention Span' (tawajjuh ki muddat) ko kaise badhaya ja sakta hai?

options.A: Unhe ek hi kaam par lamba waqt tak lagaye rakhna
options.B: Mukhtalif aur interactive activities ka istemal karna, aur chhote breaks dena
options.D: Attention span badhane ki zaroorat nahi

questions.explanation: Mukhtalif aur interactive activities, visuals aur chhote breaks bachon ki attention span ko badhane mein madad karte hain.

questions.question: Agar koi bacha 'Hyperactive' ho to ustad ko kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Uski energy ko positive tareeqe se channelize karna, jaise chhote assignments ya physical activities
options.D: Use nazar-andaaz karna

questions.explanation: Hyperactive bachon ki energy ko positive tareeqe se channelize karna zaroori hai, taaki woh class mein disturb na karein aur apni energy ko sahi jagah istemal kar saken.

questions.question: Bachon mein 'Empathy' (hamsardari) kaise develop ki ja sakti hai?

options.A: Unhe sirf apni fikar karne ko kehna
options.B: Doosron ke jazbaat ko samajhne aur unka ehsaas karne ki targheeb dena
options.D: Ye sirf bade logon ke liye hai

questions.explanation: Doosron ke jazbaat ko samajhne aur unka ehsaas karne ki targheeb dena bachon mein empathy develop karta hai.

questions.question: Classroom mein 'Visual Aids' (tasweeri imdad) ka istemal kyun zaroori hai?

options.A: Sirf class ko khoobsurat banane ke liye
options.B: Bachon ki samajh ko behtar banane aur lessons ko dilchasp banane ke liye
options.C: Visual aids sirf waqt zaya karte hain
options.D: Ye sirf chote bachon ke liye hain

questions.explanation: Visual aids bachon ki samajh ko behtar banate hain aur lessons ko ziyada dilchasp aur yadgar banate hain.

questions.question: Bachon mein 'Responsibility' (zimmedari) ka ehsaas kaise paida kiya ja sakta hai?

options.B: Chhote-chhote kaam aur zimmedariyan dekar
options.C: Sirf bade bachon ko zimmedari dena
options.D: Zimmedari ki zaroorat nahi

questions.explanation: Chhote-chhote kaam aur zimmedariyan dekar bachon mein zimmedari ka ehsaas paida kiya ja sakta hai.

questions.question: Lesson planning ka buniyadi maqsad kya hai?

options.A: Sirf ustad ka waqt zaya karna
options.B: Taleemi amal ko munazzam, maqsad-pasand aur asardar banana
options.D: Ye sirf school management ka kaam hai

questions.explanation: Lesson planning se taleemi amal munazzam, maqsad-pasand aur asardar banta hai.

questions.question: Lesson plan mein kya cheezen shamil honi chahiye?

options.B: Maqasid, sikhane ke tareeqe, sikhane ke mawad aur assessment
options.D: Bachon ke naam

questions.explanation: Ek achhe lesson plan mein maqasid (objectives), sikhane ke tareeqe (methodology), sikhane ke mawad (resources) aur assessment shamil hote hain.

questions.question: Assessment ka buniyadi maqsad kya hai?

options.A: Sirf bachon ko paas ya fail karna
options.B: Bachon ki learning progress ko janchne aur behtari ke liye feedback dena
options.C: Sirf ustad ki karkardagi janchne ke liye
options.D: Assessment ki zaroorat nahi

questions.explanation: Assessment ka maqsad bachon ki learning progress ko janchne aur unhe behtari ke liye feedback dena hai.

questions.question: 'Formative Assessment' kya hai?

options.A: Saal ke aakhir mein hone wala imtehan
options.B: Taleemi amal ke dauran bachon ki progress janchne ke liye
options.D: Assessment ka ek hi tareeqa

questions.explanation: Formative Assessment taleemi amal ke dauran bachon ki progress janchne ke liye hota hai, taaki unhe behtari ke liye feedback diya ja sake.

questions.question: Madrasa ka 'Ijtimai Kirdar' (community role) kya hai?

options.B: Taleemi, akhlaqi aur samajik rehnumai ke zariye muashre ki khidmat karna
options.C: Sirf apni char deewari tak mehdood rehna
options.D: Madrasa ka koi ijtimai kirdar nahi

questions.explanation: Madrasa ka kirdar sirf mazhabi taleem tak mehdood nahi, balki woh taleemi, akhlaqi aur samajik rehnumai ke zariye muashre ki khidmat bhi karta hai.

questions.question: Lesson plan mein 'Introduction' (tamheed) kyun zaroori hai?

options.B: Bachon ko naye topic se jodna aur unki dilchaspi paida karna
options.D: Ye sirf bade bachon ke liye hai

questions.explanation: Lesson ki tamheed bachon ko naye topic se jodti hai aur unki dilchaspi paida karti hai.

questions.question: 'Summative Assessment' kya hai?

options.A: Rozmarra ki class mein hone wala test
options.B: Taleemi daure ke ikhtitam par hone wala comprehensive imtehan
options.D: Assessment ka ek hi tareeqa

questions.explanation: Summative Assessment taleemi daure ke ikhtitam par hone wala comprehensive imtehan hota hai jo bachon ki overall learning ko evaluate karta hai.

questions.question: Madrasa muashre mein 'Aman' (peace) aur 'Hum-Ahangi' (harmony) kaise farogh de sakta hai?

options.A: Sirf apne aap tak mehdood reh kar
options.B: Islami taleemat ke zariye aman, insaf aur sabr ki ahmiyat bata kar
options.C: Doosre mazhabon ke logon se rabta na rakh kar
options.D: Madrasa ka isse koi talluq nahi

questions.explanation: Madrasa Islami taleemat ke zariye aman, insaf, sabr aur doosron ke huqooq ki ahmiyat bata kar muashre mein aman aur hum-ahangi farogh de sakta hai.

questions.question: Lesson plan mein 'Conclusion' (ikhtitam) kyun zaroori hai?

options.B: Sikhe hue ilm ko dohrana aur mustahkam karna
options.D: Ye sirf bade bachon ke liye hai

questions.explanation: Lesson ka ikhtitam sikhe hue ilm ko dohrane aur mustahkam karne mein madad karta hai.

questions.question: Bachon ko 'Self-assessment' (khud-ehtisabi) kaise sikhaya ja sakta hai?

options.A: Unhe khud ki ghaltiyan na dekhne ko kehna
options.B: Unhe apne kaam ko khud janchne aur behtari ke tareeqe talash karne ki targheeb dena
options.D: Ye sirf bade logon ke liye hai

questions.explanation: Self-assessment bachon ko apne kaam ko khud janchne aur behtari ke tareeqe talash karne ki salahiyat deta hai.

questions.question: Madrasa 'Environmental Awareness' (mahauliyati shaoor) kaise farogh de sakta hai?

options.A: Iska Islami taleem se koi talluq nahi
options.B: Islam mein qudrat ki hifazat aur safaai ki ahmiyat bata kar
options.C: Sirf science ke mazmoon mein iski baat karna
options.D: Bachon ko jungle mein bhej dena

questions.explanation: Islam qudrat ki hifazat aur safaai par zor deta hai. Madrasa Islami taleemat ki roshni mein bachon mein mahauliyati shaoor paida kar sakta hai.

questions.question: Lesson plan mein 'Differentiation' (farq) ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Sab bachon ko ek hi tareeqe se padhana
options.B: Har bache ki fardi zarooriyat aur salahiyaton ke mutabiq sikhane ke tareeqon ko adjust karna
options.C: Sirf mushkil bachon par tawajjo dena
options.D: Differentiation ki zaroorat nahi

questions.explanation: Differentiation ka matlab hai har bache ki fardi zarooriyat aur salahiyaton ke mutabiq sikhane ke tareeqon, mawad aur assessment ko adjust karna.

questions.question: Assessment mein 'Rubrics' ka istemal kyun kiya jaata hai?

options.A: Sirf bachon ko confuse karne ke liye
options.B: Assessment ko wazeh, fair aur objective banane ke liye
options.D: Ye sirf mushkil subjects ke liye hai

questions.explanation: Rubrics assessment ko wazeh, fair aur objective banate hain, jisse bachon ko pata chalta hai ki unse kya tawaqqo ki ja rahi hai.

questions.question: Madrasa 'Community Engagement' (muashre se talluq) kaise barha sakta hai?

options.A: Sirf apni char deewari tak mehdood reh kar
options.B: Walidain, local leaders aur deegar idaron ke saath milkar kaam karke
options.D: Sirf fundraising ke liye rabta karna

questions.explanation: Walidain, local leaders aur deegar idaron ke saath milkar kaam karke Madrasa muashre se behtar talluq qaim kar sakta hai.

questions.question: Lesson plan mein 'Time Management' (waqt ka intezam) ki kya ahmiyat hai?

options.B: Lesson ko waqt par mukammal karne aur sab topics ko cover karne ke liye
options.C: Sirf ustad ka waqt zaya hota hai
options.D: Ye sirf bade bachon ke liye hai

questions.explanation: Achha time management lesson ko waqt par mukammal karne aur sab topics ko cover karne mein madad karta hai.

questions.question: Madrasa 'Interfaith Harmony' (mazhabi hum-ahangi) mein kya kirdar ada kar sakta hai?

options.A: Sirf apne mazhab ki ahmiyat batana
options.B: Doosre mazhabon ka ehtiram sikhana aur mushtarka insani qadron par zor dena
options.C: Doosre mazhabon se rabta na rakhna
options.D: Madrasa ka isse koi talluq nahi

questions.explanation: Madrasa Islami taleemat ki roshni mein doosre mazhabon ka ehtiram sikhana aur mushtarka insani qadron par zor dekar interfaith harmony mein aham kirdar ada kar sakta hai.
